observation: 86.9% of customers prefer in-store shopping, including 99.9% of Premium spenders.
insight: High-value customers prioritize the "Touch and Feel" experience and immediate availability of physical stores.
business_impact: CRITICAL — In-store experience remains the primary driver of revenue for high-spending segments.
action_required: Invest in physical retail infrastructure and premium in-store services for top-tier segments.

observation: 22.1% of "Value" segment spenders prefer online shopping, compared to <0.1% of Premium spenders.
insight: Price-sensitive customers are more likely to seek convenience and discounts online.
business_impact: HIGH — Online platform should be optimized for value-conscious segments and discount-driven inventory.
action_required: Design the online platform with a focus on ease of comparison, price-alerts, and low-cost delivery.

observation: Only 3.1% of customers use a Hybrid shopping model across all segments.
insight: The "Click & Collect" or "Omnichannel" strategy is severely underutilized in this market.
business_impact: MEDIUM — Untapped growth opportunity in bridging the gap between digital discovery and physical fulfillment.
action_required: Develop a pilot for "Buy Online, Pick-up In-Store" (BOPIS) to increase hybrid adoption.
